modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to replace old computers in BaTS labs

full_description_text:  
The user is looking to swap out old computers in their lab for newer redistribution systems. They also want to know if there are any spare monitors available for their office. The request is specifically for the Biomedical and Translational Sciences (BaTS) environment.
